user_story: As a Resource Manager, I want to add a new project type, so that projects can be categorized consistently
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Project Types screen; When I click Add new project type and provide type, acronym and description; Then the project type is saved and listed

user_story: As a Resource Manager, I want to search project types, so that I can quickly locate a specific type
acceptance_criteria: Given project types exist; When I enter a Project type and click Search; Then only matching types are listed

user_story: As a Resource Manager, I want to reset the project type search, so that I can view the full list again
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied a search; When I click Reset; Then the filter clears and all project types are shown

user_story: As a Resource Manager, I want to edit a project type, so that I can update its acronym or description
acceptance_criteria: Given a project type is listed; When I click Edit and change its details; Then the updated project type is saved
